name: Oliver, the Dying Waiter

friendly.greeting: Are you... a comrade of theirs too? Go on... and burn that fake paradise to the ground.
friendly.farewell: Don't worry about me... I won't die until I've seen this spectacle to the end.

normal.greeting: It doesn't matter who it is. Tonight, this VIP floor... will be a grave for us all.
normal.farewell: Go and tell them. Dinner is ready... and now it's time for judgment.

hostile.greeting: Is there still a dog left siding with those upper-class bastards? I'll use my last bit of strength to end your breath!
hostile.farewell: Kill me... even if I die, the flames of revolution... will swallow you all!

deathLine: Finally... clocking out... to the lobby... engulfed in flames...
description:
A waiter who spent his life being despised while working in the kitchen
Even while fatally injured, he views the Resistance's attack as divine salvation and pours out deep-seated resentment toward the upper class.
last_words: Oliver: (Leaning against the kitchen counter with a deep wound in his abdomen, gasping for air.)
Oliver: Ugh... They've finally arrived. The sparks that will burn this glamorous hell to the ground...
Oliver: Every night, as I polished these foul-smelling silverwares, I prayed. I prayed for these arrogant walls to crumble!

Oliver: Those people upstairs... they laughed while drinking our sweat like wine.
Every time that laughter reached the kitchen, it felt like my heart was being scorched.

Oliver: The Resistance... they will show that there is light even for rats like us.
This blood... is merely an offering for them.
Oliver: I don't care if I die. Soon, those high-and-mighty VIPs will be crawling on the same floor as us!
Oliver: (A bloody smirk forming on his pale lips) Go now, witness it... the magnificent sight of their world turning to ash...
